description_long: This is a compact, modern-style couch with a boxy silhouette and a deep brown fabric upholstery. The seat is wide and flat, with a single, continuous cushion that appears firmly padded. The backrest is tall, straight, and unadorned, seamlessly integrated with the seat for a minimalist look. The armrests are thick, octagonal in cross-section, and extend the full depth of the couch, providing substantial support on both sides. The base is solid and rectangular, with no visible legs, giving the couch a grounded, monolithic appearance. The upholstery has a subtle woven texture, and there are no visible accent pillows or decorative elements.
description: A modern, boxy brown couch with thick octagonal armrests, a tall straight backrest, and a solid base with woven fabric upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, tall backrest, and both thick octagonal armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the straight backrest, and the full-length armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, continuous back and the tops of the armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest and the straight backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat cushion and a single, continuous backrest cushion, both integrated and attached; no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown fabric with a subtle woven texture; no visible patterns, stripes, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible; the base is a solid rectangular plinth, giving the appearance of a couch with a hidden or platform base.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are thick, straight, and octagonal in cross-section, extending the full depth of the couch; they are at seat height and fully upholstered in the same fabric.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is tall, straight, continuous, and fully attached; it is unadorned with no tufting or division.
